clean_story:
Now I will teach you dark.

Dark is when fire goes out—no glow, no warm light. Like closing eyes in deep cave, but even eyes open see nothing. Hands wave—no shadow, no shape, just empty black. When sun hides long behind big rock (night), dark comes slow, then covers all. If you step where no torch burns, dark is there—cold, heavy, like silent beast filling space.
